## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

- [ ] I have described the purpose of this PR
- [ ] I have added related issue numbers if applicable

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue)

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them:

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests
- [ ] I have added/updated integration tests
- [ ] All tests pass locally

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or videos demonstrating the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have verified my changes do not introduce any breaking changes

## Breaking Changes

If this is a breaking change, please describe:

- What is the change?
- Why is this change necessary?
- How should users migrate to the new API?

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.
